data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users spend most of their time on other sites, so design interfaces like the ones they're accustomed to using.
data.technical_spec: Consistent layout, common UI elements, and navigation patterns.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Time taken to make a decision increases with the number and complexity of choices.
data.technical_spec: Streamlining actions to reduce decision-making times.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Users tend to perceive aesthetically pleasing designs as more usable.
data.technical_spec: Focus on clean design, appealing color schemes, and minimalistic interfaces.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Objects that are close to each other appear to be more related than objects that are spaced farther apart.
data.technical_spec: Group related icons and information close together.

data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: The time to acquire a target is a function of the distance to and size of the target.
data.technical_spec: Design with larger click targets for touch interfaces.
